Comment:
Attended Minaret College site as requested by James West
Meet with Security
Keypad in reception advising RAS Fail, Fuse Fail, Siren Fail
Security showed us around the various locations until we found the RAS offline in the Canteen
Located DGP in Gym store room
Checked and confirmed 240v with on-site electrician Found onboard fuse blown
Replaced with new
Tested and confirmed all alarms were restored
Confirmed keypads showing normal state

Comment:
30/01/2024 by Jack
Attended site,

Jack - 2:30pm - 6:30pm

Assisted John with configuring the network ports for the intercoms as the front auto door is on the same 5 port switch as the intercom.
Auto door is now online.

Butler gate was offline as someone has changed the dip switch setting. Fixed issue and is now back online.

Tested butler gate and quad gate unlock when our fire cable is dropped. Robby to have fire company test this when they are out next.

Assisted John in changing network settings for cameras as he wants to make them dhcp. He’s going to try to have the main nic as the interface port which we access the nvr on. And then he’s going to try a network cable from the cctv camera vlan into port 1 behind the nvr to hopefully bring all the cams through that way. If this fails, he may need to try another way, or our solution will be to upgrade the nvr to a dual Nic nvr if required.

8:06 PM 15/02/2024 by Jack
Attended site,

Jack and James 1pm - 4:30pm

The tecom alarm door expander in the gate had a faulty power supply. The intercom was wired into that. We have removed the access control from the alarm device and re configured the way it works. The intercom now pulses salto. This is now fixed and the correct way to operate the gate.

Power supply on-site for the cctv cameras has died. Replaced with a plug pack (no backup battery required as if power goes down, the recorder stops too). No need to backup.
Cameras that weren’t working are now working again.
